NEW CHANDIGARH: There was something almost theatrical about Shreyas Iyer in the nets on Monday evening. No enclosures, no comforting mesh to keep ambition in check. Just an open sky over the Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Stadium and a batter in complete command of his range.Most of the Punjab Kings bowlers tried their hands to get the better of him but Iyer, these days, is in a different zone. Balls disappeared into the stands with regularity. A couple of defensive prods were offered, perhaps out of politeness, but they felt like interruptions. Iyer was preparing to dominate.There has been a defining shift in Iyer’s batting this season. His evolution has been as much about temperament as it has been about output. A calmness that underpins the aggression, a sense that he knows exactly how far he can push without tipping over.In that sense, the comparison with Virat Kohli as a “chase master” doesn’t feel forced anymore. The template is very similar: absorb the moment, understand the equation, and then bend it to your will. His unbeaten 71 off 36 balls in the record 265-run chase last Saturday in Delhi wasn’t just about clean hitting; it was more about control and the ability to remain unruffled under pressure.A significant part of that transformation can be traced to his partnership with head coach Ricky Ponting. The Iyer– Ponting axis has given Punjab Kings belief that they can go all the way.That system has been supercharged by the explosive starts provided by Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh. Their 116run Powerplay assault in the chase against DC was an extension of Punjab’s philosophy. Attack early, stretch the game and let Iyer engineer the finish.Punjab now return to New Chandigarh for their final home game before shifting base to Dharamshala and the expectation is to keep their momentum intact against a Rajasthan Royals side that has begun to stall. Royals started with four wins on the bounce but have since drifted.The surface at the Maharaj Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium in New Chandigarh has been a batting paradise this season. With an average first-innings score of 212, expect another high-scoring encounter. The pitch offers true bounce and pace, allowing stroke-makers to dominate. Bowlers, especially spinners, may get some grip later, but overall, it’s likely to favour aggressive batting throughout.The weather in New Chandigarh for the evening clash is expected to be warm and slightly humid, with no rain interruptions. Temperatures will hover around 28°C to 30°C during match hours, making conditions comfortable for players. Dew could play a role in the second innings, potentially aiding chasing teams.Prabhsimran Singh (wk), Priyansh Arya, Cooper Connolly, Shreyas Iyer (c), Nehal Wadhera, Shashank Singh, Marcus Stoinis, Xavier Bartlett, Marco Jansen, Vijaykumar Vyshakh, Yuzvendra ChahalImpact Player: Arshdeep SinghVaibhav Sooryavanshi, Yashasvi Jaiswal, Dhruv Jurel (wk), Riyan Parag (c), Shimron Hetmyer, Donovan Ferreira, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Nandre Burger, Tushar Deshpande, Brijesh SharmaImpact Player: Ravi BishnoiThe PBKS vs RR clash will be held at the Maharaj Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, New Chandigarh, starting at 7:30 PM IST. The match will be broadcast on Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar.Squads for Punjab Kings and Rajasthan RoyalsPrabhsimran Singh(w), Priyansh Arya, Cooper Connolly, Shreyas Iyer(c), Shashank Singh, Marcus Stoinis, Marco Jansen, Xavier Bartlett, Vijaykumar Vyshakh, Arshdeep Singh, Yuzvendra Chahal, Nehal Wadhera, Suryansh Shedge, Harpreet Brar, Vishnu Vinod, Yash Thakur, Ben Dwarshuis, Praveen Dubey, Lockie Ferguson, Azmatullah Omarzai, Mitchell Owen, Harnoor Singh, Musheer Khan, Pyla Avinash, Vishal NishadYashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel(w), Riyan Parag(c), Shimron Hetmyer, Donovan Ferreira, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Tushar Deshpande, Nandre Burger, Brijesh Sharma, Ravi Bishnoi, Lhuan-dre Pretorius, Ravi Singh, Sandeep Sharma, Shubham Dubey, Adam Milne, Dasun Shanaka, Kuldeep Sen, Sushant Mishra, Yudhvir Singh Charak, Kwena Maphaka, Vignesh Puthur, Yash Raj Punja, Aman Rao Perala
Article Summary: Punjab Kings face Rajasthan Royals at the Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Stadium in New Chandigarh. The match will be broadcast on Star Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar. Shreyas Iyer has been in a different zone this season.

Article Title: You always back your best players: LSG head coach defends decision to send Pooran for Super Over
Article Text:
Justin Langer

Watch IPL 2026: LSG's Justin Langer explains where they lost vs KKR IPL 2026: LSG's Justin Langer explains where they lost vs KKR

LUCKNOW: A day after Lucknow Super Giants’ Super Over gamble backfired against Kolkata Knight Riders, head coach Justin Langer defended the decision to send an out-of-form Nicholas Pooran to face Sunil Narine, saying the team had chosen to back “its best players” in the tightest phase of the match.Sunday night’s IPL game at the Ekana Stadium finished with both sides on 155, before Narine turned the Super Over decisively KKR’s way. Pooran was bowled first ball, LSG were restricted to 1/2 and KKR needed just one delivery to complete the win.“We knew Narine would bowl, and if you look at Nicholas Pooran’s record, he’s faced Narine more than almost anyone in world cricket. We felt he was still our best option,” Langer said. “I know he hasn’t hit form yet, but if anyone can produce a big moment, it’s Nicky. You back your best players. He has struggled, but the numbers say no one plays Narine better than him. Unfortunately, it didn’t come off.”It is curious that Langer felt that way. After all, Narine had bowled a maiden over to the lefthander in the Super Over in 2014 in a CPL match between T & T Red Steel and Guyana Amazon Warriors and even dismissed him.Surely, the LSG support staff should have been aware of that.Pooran’s failure extended a lean run that has hurt LSG in a season now slipping away from them. The defeat was LSG’s fourth straight loss at home and dropped them to 10th in the standings, leaving them virtually out of playoff contention.Langer, though, was not willing to isolate Pooran. He said the West Indian, among the most destructive T20 batters in the world over the past few years, was going through a phase that even elite players are not immune to.“It just shows he’s human,” Langer said. “You can’t force confidence. You can try to look confident but it comes from getting your processes right and working every day. He’s putting in the effort to get it back. Sometimes, it’s just a tough game.”LSG captain Rishabh Pant had also backed the call after the match, saying Pooran’s name came up during a group discussion because the team wanted to trust a proven match-winner in a high-pressure situation.
Article Summary: LSG coach Justin Langer defends decision to send Nicholas Pooran to face Sunil Narine. LSG lost by one wicket to Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026 on Sunday. Pooran was bowled first ball, LSG were restricted to 1/2 and KKR needed just one delivery to complete the win. The defeat was LSG’s fourth straight loss at home.

Article Title: Brad Haddin: 'Powerplays have become decisive': Punjab Kings coach explains IPL 2026's biggest shift
Article Text:
PBKS captain Shreyas Iyer

Watch Shreyas Iyer masterclass & Arshdeep Singh's comeback! PBKS reveal winning formula Shreyas Iyer masterclass & Arshdeep Singh's comeback! PBKS reveal winning formula

NEW CHANDIGARH: Sometime in the IPL 2026 season, the middle overs stopped mattering. The death overs still produce their theatre but a growing number of games this season have been decided within the first six overs. The two Powerplays, therefore, have become the most consequential stretch of a match.Punjab Kings assistant coach Brad Haddin has been watching this shift from close quarters. “What we are seeing is a trend throughout the tournament and how impressive most teams at the top have been in the first six overs,” he said. “It’s so hard to stop teams now with the way they’re playing the first six overs. That’s why Powerplay is becoming decisive and many games are being decided within the two Powerplays in the two innings.“You’ve obviously got the replacement player to come in so you can juggle whether that’s an extra batsman, allowing your top order to go harder than they have done in the past,” Haddin said.The presence of that extra batter has altered intent. Risk is no longer optional or a gamble, it is an instruction. For bowlers and coaches, this has triggered a constant search for disruption. “From a coach’s point of view, you’ve got to keep trying to find ways where you can slow the scoring down,” Haddin said.“It can be about picking wickets. It can be about getting the batsman to hit you in the area that you want him to hit. ” Rajasthan Royals seamer Sandeep Sharma echoed the sentiment. “Powerplays are becoming so crucial that matches are often decided within those opening phases of both innings,” he said.What makes this shift particularly striking is the consistency with which teams are executing it. This is no longer about one or two sides redefining the tempo; it is a tournament-wide phenomenon. “The first six overs have turned into a decisive phase this tournament, with teams consistently excelling and making it tough for bowlers to respond,” Sharma added.
Article Summary: Punjab Kings assistant coach Brad Haddin has been watching this shift from close quarters. Rajasthan Royals seamer Sandeep Sharma echoed the sentiment. “The first six overs have turned into a decisive phase this tournament, with teams consistently excelling and making it tough for bowlers to respond,” Sharma said.

Article Title: Ipl 2026: Yesterday IPL match result: Hazlewood, Bhuvneshwar crush DC as RCB seal nine-wicket win
Article Text:
Photo/IPL

Watch Venugopal Rao explains where Delhi Capitals lost the game while chasing a big total Venugopal Rao explains where Delhi Capitals lost the game while chasing a big total

Royal Challengers Bengaluru crushed Delhi Capitals by nine wickets in their IPL match on Monday after a new-ball spell from Josh Hazlewood and Bhuvneshwar Kumar finished the contest almost inside the first three overs.RCB’s fast bowlers broke Delhi’s batting line-up in the Powerplay, reducing them to 13 for 6 in six overs, one of the lowest starts in IPL history.Hazlewood took 4 for 12 and Bhuvneshwar picked up 3 for 5 as Delhi were bowled out for 75 in 16.3 overs. They avoided the record for the lowest IPL total, which still belongs to RCB’s 49 against Kolkata Knight Riders in 2017.Only Abhishek Porel (30), David Miller (19) and Kyle Jamieson (12) reached double figures. Delhi managed only eight fours and one six in the innings.Chasing 76, RCB openers Virat Kohli (23) and Jacob Bethell (20) gave the visitors a quick start.The only wicket in the chase was Bethell, who was dismissed after a sharp catch by T Natarajan off Jamieson’s bowling.Devdutt Padikkal then made 34 as RCB completed the chase in just 6.3 overs.Kohli and Padikkal made the chase simple, and the former finished the match with two sixes in a row off Natarajan in front of the home crowd that had come mainly to watch him bat.For Delhi, the trouble started on the second ball of the innings when Bhuvneshwar bowled debutant Sahil Parakh with an inswinging yorker that hit middle stump.Hazlewood followed with two wickets in two balls, removing last-match centurion KL Rahul for 1 and Sameer Rizvi for a duck.Rahul mistimed a pull shot, while Rizvi edged behind trying to drive away from his body.Bhuvneshwar then got Tristan Stubbs for 5 as the batter edged to Padikkal at slip. Soon after, captain Axar Patel was out for 0, edging another delivery behind.Delhi were suddenly 8 for 5 in three overs and then 9 for 6 soon after.Only one boundary came in the Powerplay, from Stubbs, while Nitish Rana (1) also fell to Hazlewood.It was fitting that Hazlewood ended the innings as well, bowling Porel to close out Delhi’s collapse.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru crushed Delhi Capitals by nine wickets in their IPL match on Monday. RCB’s fast bowlers broke Delhi's batting line-up in the Powerplay, reducing them to 13 for 6 in six overs, one of the lowest starts in IPL history. Delhi were bowled out for 75 in 16.3 overs, avoiding the record for the lowest IPL total.

Article Title: ISL: Mumbai City hold Bengaluru FC to goalless draw
Article Text:
Mumbai City vs Bengaluru FC

Watch ISL Full Highlights: Punjab FC vs Inter Kashi on April 20 ISL Full Highlights: Punjab FC vs Inter Kashi on April 20

BENGALURU: In their final home game of the ISL season, Bengaluru FC dominated possession against Mumbai City FC at the Sree Kanteerava Stadium here on Saturday, but a goalless draw left the Blues frustrated after they failed to convert their chances.It was a similar story for the visitors, who also created openings but lacked the finishing touch in front of goal.The stalemate notwithstanding, the home side acknowledged the 14,723 Blues faithful in attendance. The expressions on several players’ faces reflected the disappointment of dropping points in a crunch fixture.With both teams sharing a point, BFC moved up to fourth place with 16 points, while Mumbai (19) remained third behind leaders Mohun Bagan Super Giant (20) and FC Goa (19). Both teams have three matches left before the season concludes next month.Mumbai threatened midway through the first half, and one early chance fell to Akash Mishra, whose side-footed shot was palmed away to safety.
Article Summary: Bengaluru FC held to a goalless draw by Mumbai City FC at the Sree Kanteerava Stadium. BFC moved up to fourth place with 16 points, while Mumbai (19) remained third behind leaders Mohun Bagan Super Giant and FC Goa.

Article Title: ‘Playing for Barcelona makes you hungry for more’: Dutchwoman Brugts set for Bayern test
Article Text:
Barcelona's Esmee Brugts (AP Photo/Manu Fernandez)

Watch EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes

Poll Which team will pose a bigger challenge in the semifinal, Bayern Munich or Real Madrid? Bayern Munich Real Madrid Both have equal challenge

(Fans can watch UEFA Women’s Champions League exclusively on FanCode)

Six months back they clashed in the group stage of the new 18-team single-group format of UEFA Women’s Champions League. Then Barcelona had made a dream start to their European campaign with a 7-1 rout of Bayern Munich.The shapeshifting star of that Oct fixture, Esmee Brugts, who scored a hat-trick while starting the game as a striker and finishing it as a full-back, however believes it might not be as comfortable for the Catalans when the teams face off in the first leg of the semifinal in Munich.“The first game against them was a while ago, and with a different context. We know it will never be the same again. And that’s football. Every game is different and we have to be as prepared as we can, that’s what we train for,” Brugts said during a media interaction as her team stands on the verge of a sixth consecutive UWCL final.The 22-year-old Dutchwoman, who joined Barcelona from PSV Eindhoven in 2023, has been an integral part of Spanish coach Pere Romeu’s scheme this season, where they lost just one match to clinch their seventh Liga F title on the trot on Wednesday.The Catalans have also not lost any UWCL game since their nightmarish summit clash last season against Arsenal, where they had 20 shots on target against the English club’s eight, yet lost 1-0 to a decisive goal from Stina Blackstenius.This time they reached the semifinal by topping the group stage and beating rivals Real Madrid twice in the quarterfinal, with the second leg a return for the team to Camp Nou and Brugts having scored in both legs.Having all her role models — Dutch striker Lieke Martens, Ronaldinho and Neymar — with a Catalan link, and as a child, having famously asked for a Camp Nou tour on her birthday, Brugts acknowledged “her privilege” in striving for the Spanish club and her focus towards winning her second UWCL title with them, which will be the fourth for the Spanish champions.“Playing in Barcelona makes you hungry. As a top athlete, you are hungry to go for more. I think I’m surrounded by such players that are also never satisfied with what we have. We always want more and I learn so much by being surrounded by these teammates,” said the youngster, who has been nominated by UEFA as one of the Breakthrough Players of UWCL 2025-26.With the likes of the recovering Aitana Bonmati and Alexia Putellas up front, Brugts has made a place for herself as a versatile “playmaking defender” — having already played as winger, wing-back, right-back and full-back in Romeu’s setup.“I have several roles, it depends really on the plan of the game,” she explained.“I remember my first goal against Bayern Munich. I had the freedom to play inside more like a midfielder, you could say. This is Barca, though, and we are all very free to play where we can. It also depends on Pere (Romeu), where he wants to utilise me in each game. Yeah, I can play on the outside, inside, further up the field, it all depends,” she added.Having scored 10 goals so far in all competitions — with four of them in UWCL — and provided six assists, the Dutch international has already proved her value to her team.And with Brugts confirming the return of three-time Ballon D’Or winner Bonmati to Barcelona’s training sessions after a five-month injury hiatus, the Blaugranes will be eager to make their second sojourn at the Allianz Arena a memorable one.“We are quite happy with how it’s been so far,” she said, “But I’d say something that describes how we are in Barcelona. We are never satisfied with what we have, we always want more.”
Article Summary: Barcelona face Bayern Munich in the semifinal of UEFA Women's Champions League. Esmee Brugts scored a hat-trick in Barcelona's 7-1 win over Bayern in October. The 22-year-old has been an integral part of Spanish coach Pere Romeu’s scheme this season.

Article Title: Big blow for Spain: Injured Lamine Yamal ruled out for season ahead of FIFA World Cup
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal

Lamine Yamal has suffered a hamstring injury and will miss the rest of the season, but his club FC Barcelona said on Thursday that he is expected to be fit in time for the upcoming FIFA World Cup."Tests have confirmed that first-team player Lamine Yamal has a hamstring injury in his left leg," Barcelona said.Spain begin their Group H campaign against Cape Verde on June 15, followed by matches against Saudi Arabia on June 21 and Uruguay six days later.Yamal picked up the injury during Barcelona’s 1-0 win over Celta Vigo in La Liga on Wednesday."This injury is going to keep me off the pitch just when I wanted to be there the most, and that hurts even more than I can put into words," Yamal wrote on social media."This isn't the end, it's just a break. I'll come back stronger, with even more determination than ever, and next season will be better."The 18-year-old, who has scored six goals in 25 matches for Spain since his debut in 2023, won and scored a penalty in that game to seal the result.After converting the spot-kick past Ionut Radu, Yamal went down and asked for treatment, staying on the ground as teammates came to celebrate.He was later substituted, with Roony Bardghji coming on in his place."He wouldn't leave the pitch without reason," said Barcelona coach Hansi Flick. "As a coach you have to manage it, you have to live with it. It's a pity that Lamine is injured now."Barcelona’s win took them nine points ahead of Real Madrid at the top of the table with six matches left, including a Clasico on May 10.Yamal is the club’s top scorer this season with 24 goals, despite missing games in September and October due to a groin issue.He was also part of Spain’s Euro 2024-winning squad and had recently spoken about his aim to play in the World Cup.
Article Summary: Lamine Yamal has been ruled out for the rest of the season with a hamstring injury. The 18-year-old picked up the injury during Barcelona's 1-0 win over Celta Vigo on Wednesday. He has scored six goals in 25 matches for Spain since his debut in 2023.

Article Title: 'Moral bankruptcy of US': Tehran hits back after Donald Trump envoy suggests replacing Iran with Italy at FIFA World Cup
Article Text:
US President Donald Trump answers questions from reporters on the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the Oval Office of the White House, Monday, Nov. 17, 2025, in Washington, as FIFA president Gianni Infantino listens. (AP)

An envoy to US President Donald Trump has asked world football body FIFA to consider replacing Iran with Italy at the upcoming World Cup, according to the Financial Times.US special envoy Paolo Zampolli told the FT, as quoted by news agency AFP, that it would be a "dream" to see Italy play at the World Cup in the United States, Mexico and Canada, even though they lost in a qualification playoff last month.The Iranian embassy in Rome responded by saying the idea showed America's "moral bankruptcy" and added that Italy did not need "political privileges" to prove its football record.The FT report said the suggestion was also linked to efforts to ease tensions between Trump and Italy's Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni after differences between them over comments related to Pope Leo XIV and the Iran war."I confirm I have suggested to Trump and (FIFA President Gianni) Infantino that Italy replace Iran at the World Cup. I'm an Italian native and it would be a dream to see the Azzurri at a US-hosted tournament. With four titles, they have the pedigree to justify inclusion," Zampolli said.Italy have won the World Cup four times, but failed to qualify for a third straight edition after losing a penalty shootout to Bosnia and Herzegovina in their playoff final."Italy has earned its greatness in football on the pitch, not thanks to political privileges," the Iranian embassy said on X."The attempt to exclude Iran from the World Cup only reveals the 'moral bankruptcy' of the United States, which is afraid even of the presence of eleven young Iranians on the field of play."Iran's participation in the World Cup has been thrown into doubt by the war with the US and Israel that broke out on February 28.The Iranian football federation (FFIRI) had said in April that it was in talks with FIFA to shift its World Cup matches from the United States to Mexico.FIFA president Gianni Infantino had said last month, during Iran’s friendly match against Costa Rica in Turkey, that Iran would take part in the World Cup and would play "where they are supposed to be, according to the draw".
Article Summary: US special envoy Paolo Zampolli said it would be a "dream" to see Italy play at the World Cup in the United States, Mexico and Canada. The Iranian embassy in Rome responded by saying the idea showed America's "moral bankruptcy"

Article Title: SAFF Women's Championship: Pakistan pull out of India-hosted football tournament
Article Text:
Representative image

Watch ISL Full Highlights: Punjab FC vs Inter Kashi on April 20 ISL Full Highlights: Punjab FC vs Inter Kashi on April 20

The draw:

NEW DELHI: Pakistan’s women’s football team has pulled out of the 2026 SAFF Women’s Championship, hosted by India, the Pakistan Football Federation (PFF) said on Thursday, as reported by news agency IANS.The South Asian Football Federation (SAFF) had earlier said that all seven member teams would take part in the tournament, "making it one of the premier women’s football events in the region."With Pakistan’s withdrawal, the tournament will now be played with six teams. The event is scheduled at the Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Margao, Goa, from May 25 to June 6.This will be the second time India hosts the SAFF Women’s Championship after the 2016 edition in Siliguri, where India won their fourth title. It will also be the second SAFF tournament in Goa. The men’s SAFF Championship in 1999 was also held at the same venue, where India beat Bangladesh in the final.After Pakistan’s exit, the remaining six teams — Nepal, India (hosts), Sri Lanka, Bangladesh (defending champions), Bhutan and Maldives — have been placed into two groups following the draw held at the SAFF Secretariat in Dhaka.The withdrawal affects Pakistan women’s football, which had been looking to gain more match experience after facing administrative issues and limited international games in recent years.Pakistan had also pulled out of the men’s junior hockey World Cup held in Tamil Nadu in November last year. They did not send their senior men’s team to the Asia Cup in Rajgir as well.India are the most successful team in the SAFF Women’s Championship, winning five titles in 2010, 2012, 2014, 2016 and 2019. Bangladesh have won the last two editions in 2022 and 2024.Group A: Nepal, Sri Lanka, BhutanGroup B: India, Bangladesh, Maldives.
Article Summary: Pakistan's women's football team pulls out of 2026 SAFF Women's Championship. The tournament will now be played with six teams. The event is scheduled at the Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Margao, Goa, from May 25 to June 6.

Article Title: Fact check: Inter Kashi not paying players and staff?
Article Text:
Inter Kashi are eighth in the ISL points table. (Image: AIFF)

New Delhi:

Watch ISL Full Highlights: Punjab FC vs Inter Kashi on April 20 ISL Full Highlights: Punjab FC vs Inter Kashi on April 20

Antonio Habas. (ISL Photo)

Antonio Habas used strong words after Inter Kashi went down 0-3 to Punjab FC in the Indian Super League (ISL) on April 20. The Inter Kashi manager congratulated Punjab FC after a strong show with goals from Samir Zeljkovic, Effiong Nsungusi Jr., and Bede Osuji. But his comments toward his own team raised eyebrows."I want to say congratulations to Punjab FC, but I don’t want to talk about the match because Inter Kashi is in a very, very complicated situation with a lot of problems in the club. I don’t want to talk about the match," said Habas."We need to talk about the situation of the players and staff with the owner of the club, because it’s impossible to compete in the ISL. This is my answer today.""I am very, very sad about this situation. We have been fighting since last season 100%, and now it’s possible that the players and staff will not receive their salaries. It’s impossible," he continued.An Inter Kashi insider clarified to TimesofIndia.com that there are no financial issues within the club. Another agent informed us that they have no information on the matter.The club source suggested that the issue Habas is pointing to could well be their ongoing legal tussle with Churchill Brothers.That process has seen Inter Kashi and Churchill Brothers approach the All India Football Federation (AIFF), the Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) and now the Delhi High Court.The two clubs have been locked in a legal battle over last year's I-League title. After Churchill were crowned champions, and literally handed over the trophy, the title was awarded to Inter Kashi following a disciplinary hearing. CAS had ruled in favour of Inter Kashi, and the club were promoted to the ISL.Churchill, however, attempted to gain entry as late as after the start of the ISL season, but their efforts were unsuccessful. The club also opted against playing in the second division (now called the Indian Football League).On March 31, the AIFF had accused its Executive Committee member and Churchill Brothers CEO Valanka Alemao of exerting “sustained pressure” to facilitate their inclusion in the ISL.The statement came on the day Valanka accused AIFF president Kalyan Chaubey, vice president NA Haris and deputy secretary general M Satyanarayan of intimidation and harassment during the Executive Committee meeting.Meanwhile, Inter Kashi's first season in the ISL has, expectedly, been a challenge. It took them until the third game for their first win of the season, and the loss to Punjab halted their streak of two victories.They're eighth in the ISL points table with 11 points after nine matches played, clinching three wins along the way. Their next game is against NorthEast United FC on May 2.
Article Summary: Inter Kashi lost 0-3 to Punjab FC in the Indian Super League (ISL) on April 20. Inter Kashi are eighth in the ISL points table with 11 points after nine matches played. Their next game is against NorthEast United FC on May 2. The two clubs are in a legal battle over last year's I-League title.

Article Title: Manchester City: Manchester City leapfrog Arsenal in Premier League title race; Burnley relegated
Article Text:
Manchester City's Erling Haaland, second right, scores his side's goal against Burnley. (AP Photo)

Haaland delivers, City seize control

Burnley relegated after dismal run

Race tightens, drama builds

Manchester City edged ahead in the Premier League title race after a hard-fought 1-0 win over Burnley FC at Turf Moor, a result that not only sent Pep Guardiola’s side top but also confirmed Burnley’s relegation.A first-half strike from Erling Haaland proved decisive as City moved above Arsenal FC on goals scored, with both teams locked on points and five matches remaining in a gripping title battle.City, fresh from a crucial win over Arsenal days earlier, started with intent. Within five minutes, Haaland capitalised on a precise pass from Jérémy Doku, calmly chipping the ball over goalkeeper Martin Dúbravka to hand the visitors an early lead.The defending champions dominated proceedings, repeatedly testing Dubravka, while Rayan Cherki came close with a long-range effort that rattled the woodwork. Despite controlling the game, City failed to extend their advantage, much to the frustration of manager Pep Guardiola.“The chances were there. We created a lot. We made a fantastic game,” Guardiola said, while also expressing disappointment at his side’s inability to convert dominance into a bigger margin.Burnley nearly punished that profligacy before half-time when Zian Flemming dragged a golden opportunity wide. Haaland later struck the post after the break, but City had to settle for a narrow win.The defeat confirmed Burnley’s relegation to the Championship for the third time in five seasons. Managed by Scott Parker, the Clarets have endured a torrid campaign, collecting just 20 points from 34 matches.“We’ve fallen a bit short… in certain moments we’ve lacked quality,” Parker admitted, as his side slipped 13 points from safety with only four games left.Burnley’s drop continues a pattern of promotion and relegation struggles, highlighting the gap between the Premier League and the second tier.At the top, City’s victory sets up a tense finale. Although they now lead the standings, Guardiola’s men face a tougher run-in compared to Arsenal, keeping the title race finely balanced.Elsewhere, Leeds United boosted their survival hopes with a late 2-2 draw against AFC Bournemouth, while Bournemouth’s push for European qualification took a hit.
Article Summary: Erling Haaland scores only goal of the game as Manchester City beat Burnley FC 1-0 at Turf Moor. Defeat confirms Burnley's relegation to the Championship for the third time in five seasons. Leeds United and AFC Bournemouth play out 2-2 draw at Elland Road.

Article Title: Chelsea sack coach Liam Rosenior as Blues hit historic low with five straight EPL defeats
Article Text:
Chelsea's head coach Liam Rosenior (AP Photo)

Historic slump triggers ruthless call

Financial strain, dressing room cracks

Chelsea FC have sacked head coach Liam Rosenior less than four months into his tenure, bringing a swift and dramatic end to a spell marred by historic underachievement.The decision came in the wake of a 3-0 defeat to Brighton & Hove Albion — a result Rosenior himself branded “unacceptable” — and a dire run that has seen Chelsea lose five consecutive Premier League matches without scoring. It marks the club’s worst such streak since 1912, underlining the scale of the collapse.“Chelsea Football Club has today parted company with Head Coach Liam Rosenior,” the club said in a statement, admitting performances had “fallen below the necessary standards” despite the season still being alive.Rosenior, 41, had arrived in January from RC Strasbourg Alsace following the exit of Enzo Maresca. While his appointment raised eyebrows, early promise quickly gave way to a staggering downturn.Chelsea have now lost seven of their last eight matches in all competitions, including a heavy Champions League exit to Paris Saint-Germain and a League Cup elimination at the hands of Arsenal FC.The Blues currently sit seventh in the table, seven points off the Champions League places with just four games remaining — far from expectations for a squad assembled at enormous cost.Assistant coach Calum McFarlane has been placed in interim charge, beginning with a crucial FA Cup semi-final clash against Leeds United. His immediate task will be to salvage European qualification and ease the financial burden after Chelsea reported a staggering £262.4 million pre-tax loss last season.Behind the scenes, tensions had been brewing. Questions over the earlier sacking of Maresca were publicly raised by senior players including Enzo Fernández and Marc Cucurella, while inconsistent performances further strained relations between the squad and Rosenior.The club’s ownership group, led by Todd Boehly, has now dismissed five permanent managers in under five seasons, raising serious concerns about long-term stability despite over £1 billion spent on players.Chelsea confirmed they will begin a “process of self-reflection” to appoint a long-term successor, with names like Andoni Iraola, Marco Silva and Edin Terzic already linked.
Article Summary: Chelsea have sacked head coach Liam Rosenior less than four months into his tenure. The decision came in the wake of a 3-0 defeat to Brighton & Hove Albion. Chelsea have now lost seven of their last eight matches in all competitions.

Article Title: Mohammedan Sporting: ISL: A well-earned point for Mohammedan Sporting against Chennaiyin FC
Article Text:
Mohammedan Sporting vs Chennaiyin FC match. (Pic credit: ISL)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

CHENNAI: After all they have been through this season, Mohammedan Sporting will head home satisfied with a 0-0 draw against Chennaiyin FC in the Indian Super League at the Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium on Tuesday. A single point did not do much to their position as relegation-threatened Md Sporting remained last in the table with two points from nine matches, while CFC are ninth with nine points.Chennaiyin started strongly but Md Sporting grew into the game with a sustained spell of attack after the 20-minute mark. It began with a series of three corners, the last of which saw Makan Chothe whip in a curling cross from the left towards an unmarked Hira Mondal. At the far post, the defender stretched to guide the ball goalward but goalkeeper Mohammed Nawaz produced a fingertip save to deny the effort.Nawaz came to Chennaiyin’s rescue on a couple of occasions and kept the score board in check. Meanwhile, despite creating chances, CFC lacked the finishing touch in the final third.In the second half, Chennaiyin attempted to build from the back but Md Sporting stood firm with a well-organised back four. Midfielder Alberto Noguera dropped deep, which limited his creative influence. CFC coach Clifford Miranda turned to his bench, bringing on fresh legs Inigo Martin and ‘local lad’ S. Prakadeswaran, yet the home side struggled to break through.
Article Summary: Mohammedan Sporting draw 0-0 with Chennaiyin FC in Indian Super League. Md Sporting remain last in the table with two points from nine matches, while CFC are ninth with nine points. CFC coach Clifford Miranda brought on fresh legs Inigo Martin and ‘local lad’ S. Prakadeswaran.

Article Title: Diego Pavia: NFL snub pushes undrafted Diego Pavia toward the CFL amid one team's interest as Jon Gruden clip sparks questions
Article Text:
NFL snub pushes undrafted Diego Pavia toward the CFL amid one team's interest as Jon Gruden clip sparks questions (Getty)

UFL and CFL paths come into focus as NFL window tightens for QB Diego Pavia



Jon Gruden clip resurfaces and adds fresh questions to Diego Pavia’s draft story

Diego Pavia walked into the 2026 NFL Draft expecting a chance. He walked out without one. Seven rounds passed, and no team called his name. For a Heisman runner-up who produced at a high level, that silence has quickly turned into one of the biggest talking points after the draft.Now the focus has shifted just as fast. Pavia still has a small opening to chase an NFL spot, but the conversation is already moving beyond that. Alternative leagues are no longer backup plans. They are real paths, and at the same time, a resurfaced clip has added another layer to how his situation is being viewed.Right after the draft, Diego Pavia accepted a rookie minicamp invite from the Baltimore Ravens. That keeps him in the NFL picture, but only barely. Minicamp invites give a shot, not a guarantee, and competition at quarterback remains tight.Because of that, the main attention has shifted to other leagues that offer a clearer role. The UFL stands out as a natural fit. Pavia’s ability to move, extend plays, and operate outside structure suits that style of football. Analyst Pat McAfee summed it up on X when he said, “If it doesn’t work out… is he not the UFL QB blueprint?” The comment reflects how his skill set could translate better outside the NFL system.At the same time, the CFL offers something even more direct. The Winnipeg Blue Bombers already hold Pavia’s negotiating rights. That puts them in control if he decides to go that route. Unlike the NFL, where he must compete within a short tryout window, the CFL offers a more stable entry point.While those options gained traction, another moment returned to the spotlight. A pre-draft clip of Pavia speaking with Jon Gruden started circulating again. In that exchange, Gruden asked about his agent. Pavia replied, “No, I’m representing myself,” and added that he did not want anyone taking a percentage of his earnings.That response sounded confident at the time. After the draft, it raised questions. It did not decide his outcome on its own, but it added to concerns teams already had about his size and arm strength. When those doubts stack up, teams tend to move in a different direction.Agent Malki Kawa later clarified on X, saying, “He didn’t have an NIL agent. I am his agent for the NFL.” That clears up part of the confusion, but it came after decisions had already been made.Now everything connects. The NFL chance depends on a short minicamp window. The UFL offers a better stylistic fit. The CFL already has a team ready to sign him with its rights. And with that clip back in focus, every move Pavia makes from here will carry even more attention.
Article Summary: Diego Pavia was not selected in the 2026 NFL Draft. He accepted a rookie minicamp invite from the Baltimore Ravens. The UFL offers a better stylistic fit. The CFL already has a team ready to sign him with its rights.

Article Title: Taylor Swift And Travis Kelce: Taylor Swift turns NYC into her runway with a $9,750 Dior flex as Travis Kelce's wedding plans heat up in Manhattan

Article Title: Nfl Trade Rumors: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs and Denver Broncos could target the $15 million Atlanta Falcons star ahead of the 2026 season
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs and Denver Broncos could target to $15 million Atlanta Falcons star ahead of the 2026 season (Getty Images)

NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs and Denver Broncos emerge as serious options if Atlanta Falcons move star tight end Kyle Pitts

NFL trade rumors around the Kansas City Chiefs and Denver Broncos picked up again. The focus sits on Atlanta Falcons tight end Kyle Pitts. Multiple reports now place him firmly on the trade radar.The situation feels simple but risky. Atlanta needs picks. Contenders want a rare athlete at tight end. That balance has pushed Pitts right into the center of the current trade chatter.The Atlanta Falcons do not own a first-round pick and hold only five selections. That lack of draft capital shapes their approach. General manager Ian Cunningham addressed it during his pre-draft press conference in Atlanta. He said, “If people call, we are going to listen,” while speaking to reporters at the team facility. That line set the tone for what could follow.Naturally, Kyle Pitts became the biggest name in these trade rumours. The 25-year-old finished last season with 928 receiving yards and five touchdowns. He still offers elite size and speed, which keeps his value high despite an unsettled contract.The Kansas City Chiefs look like a clean fit. A CBS Sports analysis suggested Kansas City could move the 29th overall pick to land Pitts.The reason connects directly to Travis Kelce. He turns 37 in October and continues to weigh retirement each offseason. Adding Pitts gives Patrick Mahomes a long-term weapon without changing the offense.At the same time, the Denver Broncos remain a quiet but logical contender. Their offense under Sean Payton has chased an athletic tight end for years. Attempts with players like Greg Dulcich did not fully click. Pitts fits that mould. He can stretch the field and create mismatches, something this scheme relies on.The Denver Broncos also upgraded their offence this offseason, and adding Pitts could tie the unit together. While no formal offer has surfaced, league chatter has placed the Broncos among teams closely monitoring the situation.For the Atlanta Falcons, the call is not easy. Trading Pitts could bring back a first-round pick, possibly from Kansas City. Keeping him means betting on a long-term extension or another strong season on the tag. Right now, no deal is locked. Still, with the draft clock ticking, both the Chiefs and Broncos sit in a position to turn these NFL trade rumours into a real headline overnight.
Article Summary: Kansas City Chiefs and Denver Broncos could target Atlanta Falcons star Kyle Pitts. The 25-year-old tight end finished last season with 928 receiving yards and five touchdowns. He still offers elite size and speed, which keeps his value high despite an unsettled contract.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Minnesota Vikings linked with $82M WR in bold plan to maximize Kyler Murray prime
Article Text:
NFL trade rumors (X/Vikings)

Should the Vikings sign Deebo Samuel to unlock Kyler Murray’s strengths?



Does a “C+” draft grade increase pressure on roster moves?



The Minnesota Vikings have closed the book on their 2026 draft, but the real conversation has just begun. A class that leaned heavily on defense has left clear gaps on offense, and the focus now shifts to how the roster will support Kyler Murray moving forward. With questions lingering around key picks and overall balance, there’s growing noise around a veteran addition who could reshape the offense quickly. The idea is simple: don’t wait for rookies to develop when immediate help is available.The push to add Deebo Samuel Sr. isn’t coming out of nowhere. It’s rooted in how Murray operates at his best. Dustin Barker laid it out clearly: “Kyler Murray, entering his eighth season, has never been known for a deep-ball-heavy offense, although Murray certainly has the arm for it.” That detail matters. The Vikings don’t need to force Murray into a system that doesn’t fit. They need to build around what already works.That’s where Samuel enters the picture. Barker added, “If the Vikings build their offense around his obvious strengths — a strategy they absolutely should pursue — Samuel would be a highly sensible target.” It’s not just about adding another receiver. It’s about adding the right kind. Samuel thrives in space, and as Barker noted, “Samuel excels with the ball in his hands, typically operating near or just beyond the line of scrimmage.There’s also the bigger picture. Pairing Samuel with Justin Jefferson and Jordan Addison would immediately change how defenses line up. Austin Swaim captured that upside: “Imagine telling someone at the start of 2023 that Deebo Samuel would be combining with Justin Jefferson and Jordan Addison. That would be discussed as perhaps the greatest wide receiver room ever.”Even with questions about his recent production, the baseline remains strong. Swaim pointed out, “Samuel’s ‘decline’ being a season in which he still crested 700 receiving yards despite quarterback issues might mean that becomes a reality.” In other words, the drop-off may not be as steep as it looks. Samuel’s career earnings are around $82 million, according to research from Spotract.The Vikings’ draft hasn’t exactly quieted doubts. Outlets like The Ringer handed out a “C+” grade, describing it as a “high-protein draft class” that focused “on the defensive side of the ball early.” That approach isn’t inherently flawed, but it does leave the offense feeling unfinished.The most debated decision remains the selection of Caleb Banks at No. 18. Concerns about durability haven’t gone away. As noted elsewhere, “Banks has been waylaid by multiple foot injuries in the last year, and staying healthy could be a considerable concern.” Still, there’s belief in the upside if he holds up physically.That tension defines where the Vikings stand right now. They’ve added potential, but not certainty. And in a division that rarely waits for teams to figure things out, relying on projection alone is a gamble.Adding a proven playmaker like Samuel wouldn’t erase every concern. But it would send a clear signal. The Vikings aren’t just building for later. They’re trying to compete now, with a roster that fits their quarterback instead of forcing the reverse.
Article Summary: The Minnesota Vikings have closed the book on their 2026 draft. The focus now shifts to how the roster will support Kyler Murray moving forward. There’s growing noise around a veteran addition who could reshape the offense quickly. The Vikings don’t need to force Murray into a system that doesn't fit.

Article Title: Did Taylor Swift break up with Travis Kelce? What’s real and what’s rumor?
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce breakup rumors (Getty Images)

Did Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce really break up?



For nearly three years, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have held a rare place at the intersection of pop culture and professional sport. So when a sudden breakup claim began circulating online this week, it didn’t take long for panic to spread. The rumor, amplified across social media, suggested the couple had quietly split. There was just one problem. There is no credible evidence to support it. What unfolded instead was a familiar story of how quickly misinformation can take hold when it involves two globally recognized figures.No, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are still together. All these were rumors. This can be traced back to a single post on X, where a widely shared message declared, “Taylor Swift has ended her relationship with Travis Kelce.” The phrasing was sharp and definitive, designed to resemble a breaking news update. Within hours, it had racked up massive engagement, pulling in fans from both music and NFL circles.What many missed, at least initially, was a small but crucial detail. The account behind the post clearly labels itself as a parody. That context didn’t travel nearly as fast as the claim itself. By the time users began questioning the source, the narrative had already taken on a life of its own.There is no confirmation from Swift, Kelce, or their representatives suggesting a split. No credible outlet has reported a breakup. The rumor stands on nothing more than a misleading post crafted to generate clicks and reactions.Still, the speed at which it spread says something about the level of public investment in their relationship. This is not a low-profile pairing. Their story has played out in full view, from Kelce’s lighthearted admission on his podcast about a missed chance to meet Swift, to her eventual appearance at a Chiefs game that turned speculation into reality.Since then, their relationship has been marked by visible support. Kelce has attended Swift’s global tour stops during his offseason. Swift, in turn, has been a regular presence at NFL games, including the Chiefs’ Super Bowl run. Their dynamic has felt open, even intentional, in how it invites fans into key moments without overexposing the private side.That visibility also comes with a cost. When schedules get busy or public appearances slow down, gaps are quickly filled with speculation. In this case, vague gossip about their demanding routines created just enough uncertainty for a false claim to gain traction.For now, nothing suggests the relationship has changed. If anything, this episode highlights how easily narratives can be shaped without facts. The couple has not addressed the rumor directly, and they likely won’t. They haven’t needed to.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have held a rare place at the intersection of pop culture and professional sport. So when a sudden breakup claim began circulating online this week, it didn't take long for panic to spread. There is no credible evidence to support it.

Article Title: Viral photo of Bill Belichick and Jordon Hudson at cheer event draws mixed reactions from fans
Article Text:
Bill Belichick and Jordon Hudson (Getty Images)

Why was Bill Belichick at Jordon Hudson’s cheer competition?



Jordon Hudson’s latest competition win came with an unexpected sideline story. At the Cheerleading Worlds in Florida, the spotlight briefly shifted from the mat to the stands, where 74-year-old Bill Belichick watched on. The longtime NFL coach, known for his rigid game-day demeanor, was there in a very different role, supporting his 25-year-old girlfriend as her Cheer Extreme Code Black team secured another title. The image felt unusual at first glance, but it quickly became one of those moments that people couldn’t quite look away from.Jordon Hudson didn’t just bring Belichick along quietly. She leaned into it. After her team won the International Open Coed Non-Tumbling division, she posted a photo that captured the moment with a playful caption: “Roses 🆙 for Bill the WAG 💍🌹🌹🌹👌🏻.”It was a striking contrast. For years, Belichick built his reputation on control, discipline, and a near-blank public persona. Here, he was in team gear, standing among cheer families, absorbing a world far removed from NFL sidelines. The shift wasn’t lost on fans.Some reacted with confusion. “I have no idea what’s happening here so I can’t imagine how he feels,” one fan wrote. Others leaned into humor. “My daughter’s been an all-star cheerleader for 10 years.Bill definitely has that cheer dad energy,” another joked. A few were more critical, while some simply seemed puzzled by the pairing. “Old fool,” one fan added.Still, not every response carried skepticism. There was a quieter thread running through the reactions. “I think he genuinely looks happy,” one fan noted. That observation, simple as it sounds, may explain why the moment resonated.Hudson’s team, Code Black, has quietly built a strong run, stacking titles and establishing itself as one of the more consistent groups in its division. Her presence in the sport didn’t start here either. She cheered in college and has continued competing at a high level, which adds context to why this win mattered.Belichick, meanwhile, appeared comfortable being out of his element. No headset. No play sheet. Just another supporter in the crowd, even if the attention inevitably followed him.The relationship itself continues to draw mixed reactions, but moments like this suggest a certain ease between them. It may look unconventional from the outside, yet there’s a sense that both are settled in their roles. And for Belichick, that now includes standing on the sidelines of a cheer competition, clapping along and, as Hudson framed it, embracing life as “Bill the WAG.”
Article Summary: Jordon Hudson, 25, cheered at the Cheerleading Worlds in Florida. Her team won the International Open Coed Non-Tumbling division. Her boyfriend, 74-year-old Bill Belichick, was in the stands to cheer on her team.

Article Title: Brittany Mahomes and Patrick redefined NFL draft weekend with music, fun, and unfiltered Stagecoach moments
Article Text:
Patrick and Brittany Mahomes (Instagram)

Patrick Mahomes and Brittany embrace laid-back Stagecoach weekend, delighting fans with rare glimpses

How did the Chiefs approach the 2026 NFL Draft?

Patrick Mahomes did not spend the entire NFL Draft weekend buried in film or glued to a phone. While the Kansas City Chiefs worked through their 2026 selections, their quarterback was in Indio, California, taking in the Stagecoach Music Festival with Brittany Mahomes. It was a brief break from football, but not a quiet one. Brittany’s social media posts offered a candid window into the couple’s weekend, blending music, dust, and a few playful moments that quickly caught attention.Mahomes’ presence at Stagecoach came as the Chiefs’ front office handled business back home. Brittany documented much of the trip, posting photos and videos on April 26 that showed the couple leaning into the festival atmosphere. Western outfits set the tone. Mahomes wore a beige cowboy hat with a checkered shirt, while Brittany paired black cowboy boots with a crochet dress.Some moments were lighthearted, even a bit cheeky. In one photo, Mahomes grabbed Brittany’s backside and stuck out his tongue. Another captured him kissing her cheek as she flashed a peace sign. It felt unscripted, a glimpse of a couple enjoying time away from the routine.The festival itself was not without disruption. Strong winds swept through the grounds, forcing a temporary evacuation and delaying Lainey Wilson’s set. Brittany’s posts reflected that reality. In one clip, she and her friends laughed as gusts pushed through while they walked toward the parking area. Another image showed her hair visibly affected by the conditions. “Inhaled lots of dirt, it was great🤠,” she wrote, leaning into the chaos rather than complaining.Earlier in the weekend, the couple also posed with Dan + Shay, continuing a pattern of coordinated outfits and relaxed energy. Brittany summed up the mood in a separate caption: “In my element✨.”Back in Kansas City, the Chiefs stayed focused. The team added seven players across three days, addressing depth and future needs. The approach was measured, but not passive.According to NFL.com analyst Chad Reuter, the front office made calculated moves to reshape key areas. “Kansas City traded two mid-round picks to Cleveland to move up for Delane, the top cornerback in the class and a valid replacement for Trent McDuffie, who was traded to the Rams for four picks,” Reuter wrote. “The return for McDuffie included the 29th overall selection, which the Chiefs used on active defensive lineman Woods, despite Woods’ slide in production last fall. With their only Day 2 pick, they took Thomas over Cashius Howell, filling their need for speed on the edge with the former Oklahoma Sooner, who shows some surprising pass-rush power.”The draft class is still taking shape, especially with undrafted signings ongoing. But the early impression suggests a roster quietly being recalibrated.Mahomes’ weekend, then, captured two parallel tracks. One was personal, filled with music and windblown moments. The other moved forward without him, steady and deliberate, setting the foundation for what comes next.
Article Summary: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes attended Stagecoach Music Festival. Brittany documented much of the trip, posting photos and videos on Instagram. Mahomes’ presence came as the Chiefs’ front office handled business back home. Back in Kansas City, the team added seven players across three days.

Article Title: George Kittle and wife Claire discuss future plans at NFL Draft, hinting at a quiet family-first life after football
Article Text:
George Kittle and Claire Kittle (Instagram)

What does George Kittle want after football ends?

George Kittle is nearing a point in his career where the questions change. At 32, with nearly a decade in the league, he is no longer just chasing roster spots or contracts. Speaking at the 2026 NFL Draft alongside his wife Claire, the San Francisco 49ers star offered a candid look at what comes next. His focus is shifting toward stability, long-term planning, and a life that extends well beyond football.George Kittle did not dress it up. He spoke plainly about how priorities evolve in the league. Early on, it is about survival. Then it becomes about proving value. Eventually, it turns into a quieter calculation about time and longevity."At this point in my career, I've been very fortunate to play for 10 years," George tells PEOPLE in Pittsburgh, where U.S. Bank kicked off its partnership with the NFL.He walked through that progression with clarity. "And when you start in the league, your only goal is like, 'I want to make a team, so I can play in the NFL,' " he continued. "And then once you've made a team now it's like, 'I want to establish myself as a good player. I want to make a second contract.' "That ladder does not stop there. "And then it's like once you've made that second contract, it's, 'How much longer can I play? Can I get another contract?' " explained George, who acknowledged the realities of the "third trimester" of an NFL career.For Kittle, that awareness is no longer abstract. "I'm definitely not a rookie anymore. There is a finish line at some point. I'm not going to play forever." And it's like, 'Okay, well, how can I set myself up financially and have a plan as to where, when I'm done playing, if I don't want to, I don't have to work again.' ""That's the goal."That plan, however, is not just about stepping away comfortably. It is deeply personal. "When we have kids, and I want to be a stay-at-home dad, and that's what I want to be able to do every day," George told PEOPLE, sharing, "I don't want to go have to get another job.""And because I've been so fortunate to play in the NFL for 10 years, that's kind of the plan that we've had set," he said, adding, "And so, if I can do that, that'd be a dream come true."Claire Kittle has been part of that planning from the start. She pointed to their partnership with U.S. Bank as a key step in navigating the financial side of a pro athlete’s life. "It's very beneficial," she shared.Her perspective carries weight. A former college athlete, she understands both the demands and the narrow window of a sports career. "He's living out his dream, right? I was an athlete as well growing up my entire life, played basketball in college. That's where we met. Every athlete wants to go and play professionally," she emphasized. "And he's doing that. He's of the 1% and he's very, very good at it. He's one of the top players. "She wants him to finish on his own terms. "I don't want him to have any regrets whatsoever on the football field," she continued. "I want him to be as successful as possible for when he hangs up the cleats one day... and then transition into that retirement a little bit easier.""It's never going to be easy, but a little bit easier, hopefully."
Article Summary: George Kittle is nearing a point in his career where the questions change. At 32, with nearly a decade in the league, he is no longer just chasing roster spots or contracts. His focus is shifting toward stability, long-term planning and a life that extends well beyond football.

Article Title: Are Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini still emotionally connected? Insider calls their past an ‘open secret’ relationship
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel And Dianna Russini photo scnadal (Getty Images)

Are Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini still emotionally connected?

Could this controversy reshape their personal lives and NFL standing?

Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have become the subject of intense speculation after the two were spotted together at a hotel weeks ago. Old photos from a 2020 bar encounter quickly resurfaced. Both are married. Vrabel, 50, has been with wife Jen for over 25 years. Russini, 43, married Kevin Goldschmidt in September 2020. And yet, here we are.The most persistent thread in this story is not the sightings or the viral clips. It is the suggestion that something deeper never fully faded. According to an insider, the bond between Vrabel and Russini has remained intact despite time, distance, and their respective marriages."There is still a deep connection between Dianna and Mike that they can’t act on now that they are surrounded by this controversy…The next several months are going to be a humongous test for both of them."That assessment has only intensified scrutiny. Vrabel has long been vocal about his commitment to his wife, often stating, "I love [my wife] to death." Yet the contrast between that public stance and the ongoing speculation has left many in NFL circles uneasy.Russini, meanwhile, has stepped away from social media, a silence that has only added to the intrigue.What complicates matters further is how insiders describe the situation. This is not being framed as a fleeting rumor but as a connection that lingered over time. In a league where perception matters as much as performance, that distinction carries weight.The fallout may extend far beyond headlines. Questions are now being asked about the stability of both marriages, with one insider admitting that "literally every option seems to be on the table." That kind of uncertainty is rare in such public-facing roles, especially for a head coach and a prominent reporter.Adding another layer, Susan Constantine analyzed Vrabel’s recent public remarks. She pointed to subtle signs of strain, including restrained movement and visible tension, interpreting them as emotional pressure rather than deception. Her conclusion suggested sincerity, but also a man navigating a difficult moment.At the same time, comments made on Pablo Torre Finds Out have shifted the narrative. The claim that their relationship was widely discussed behind the scenes has reframed the story. As one account put it:"All of these head coaches across the pool and their wives, I’m told, started talking about Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini. And this is days before the photos broke in the New York Post... Their friendship was not breaking news to the people at the owners’ meetings. They all knew. In fact, they were out front together at this other competing aspirational party."That perspective suggests this was less a sudden revelation and more a long-running undercurrent. For Vrabel and Russini, the challenge now is not just managing public reaction, but navigating what comes next in private.
Article Summary: Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have become the subject of intense speculation after the two were spotted together at a hotel weeks ago. The most persistent thread in this story is the suggestion that something deeper never fully faded. Questions are now being asked about the stability of both marriages.

Article Title: "She has been with many coaches": New claims against Dianna Russini widen scandal as more NFL names surface
Article Text:
Dianna Russini faces renewed scrutiny after an anonymous account alleged she had relationships with multiple married NFL figures, including Nick Caserio, though no evidence supports the claims. The controversy, already linked to Mike Vrabel, has intensified online debate. Meanwhile, Shannon Sharpe questioned calls for Vrabel’s firing, stressing that personal matters should not dictate professional consequences.

Anonymous claims spark fresh wave of speculation about Dianna Russini

Fallout grows as league figures weigh in on the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel scandal

The Dianna Russini controversy has gotten even darker, as more names are added to an already tense situation with new allegations online. The buzz about Mike Vrabel has now turned into larger accusations that are spreading rapidly on social media. The timing couldn't be more sensitive, coming at a time when the NFL world is still locked in on offseason moves and draft reactions.Explosive accusations have fanned the flames with an anonymous account claiming to be a former NFL scout. The allegations are unproven, but they have intensified scrutiny of Russini's past associations. The increasing size of the conversation highlights a common theme in today’s sports culture, where the online narrative can drive perception before the facts have a chance to catch up.The account, operating under the name “Angry Scout Vet,” made bold accusations that quickly gained traction. In a now-viral post, the user wrote, "I see the breadcrumbs being found online. I have only called out a couple names but Russini has a Rolodex full. She has been with many coaches. Mike was her favorite but she dated Caserio for a while even though he was married. She loves married men."Nick Caserio, current Houston Texans general manager, was mentioned.But there is no verified evidence to support these claims. But the lack of verification has not stopped the narrative from spreading, showing just how fast speculation can travel in the digital age.This latest development builds on an already complicated situation involving Russini and Vrabel. Their connection first drew attention after photos surfaced from a resort outing, which both parties insisted was harmless and taken out of context.As the noise intensifies, high-profile voices have begun to push back on how the situation is being handled. Shannon Sharpe addressed the controversy publicly, questioning why it should impact Vrabel’s professional standing.“Dianna Russini does not work for the Patriots, Mike Vrabel does not work for ESPN,” Sharpe said. “What are you firing Mike Vrabel for? What law or code did he break? He broke his vows. Like I said, that’s between him and his wife. That’s between him and God. They are not the same.”Meanwhile, Russini has already stepped away from her role, stating she refused to let the situation define her career. The ongoing saga reflects a wider issue in sports media, where personal lives and professional reputations often collide in public view.
Article Summary: Anonymous account claims Dianna Russini had relationships with multiple married NFL figures, including Nick Caserio. The controversy, already linked to Mike Vrabel, has intensified online debate. Shannon Sharpe questioned calls for V rabel's firing, stressing that personal matters should not dictate professional consequences.

Article Title: Buying gifts for Dianna Russini or his wife? Mike Vrabel’s airport sighting fuels fresh buzz as controversy refuses to fade
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel was seen shopping alone at a Salt Lake City airport while taking time away from the New England Patriots to seek counseling amid controversy involving Dianna Russini. His absence during the NFL Draft drew attention, though the team supported his break. Vrabel emphasized personal growth and family focus, while ongoing reports about his connection with Russini continue to keep the situation under public scrutiny.

Mike Vrabel steps away as scrutiny intensifies

Patriots choose distance over disruption

The spotlight around Mike Vrabel refuses to dim, and the latest sighting only adds another layer to an already messy storyline. The New England Patriots head coach was recently seen alone at an airport gift shop in Salt Lake City, quietly picking out a baby blue sweatsuit while away from the team. The timing raised eyebrows. His trip coincided with a critical phase of the 2026 NFL Draft, yet Vrabel chose distance over presence as he stepped back to focus on personal matters.This moment comes amid ongoing scrutiny tied to NFL insider Dianna Russini, with whom Vrabel has been linked in recent weeks. While both have publicly downplayed speculation, fresh sightings and past reports have kept the conversation alive. Away from the cameras of draft coverage and team operations, Vrabel’s low-key airport stop painted a different picture. It showed a coach navigating pressure not just from the field, but from a deeply personal storm.Mike Vrabel’s absence during such a crucial football weekend was not accidental. It followed his own public commitment to seek counseling, a move that signals both accountability and awareness.In his statement, he said, “I promised my family, this organization and this team that I was going to give them the best version of me that I can possibly give them.In order to do so, I have committed to seeking counseling, starting this weekend. This is something that I have given a lot of thought to and is something I would advise a player to do if I was counseling them.”He added, “I have always wanted to lead by example, and I believe this is what I have to do to be the best husband, father and coach that I possibly can be. This is not an easy thing for me to admit, but it is one that I know will make me a better person. I appreciate the support that everyone has given me and promise a stronger resolve as a result.”Behind the scenes, the Patriots organization appeared to support that decision. Rather than pulling Vrabel into draft-day communication, team leadership allowed him uninterrupted time with his family. That choice spoke volumes. It showed a franchise willing to prioritize long-term stability over short-term control.Still, the situation remains fluid. Reports of past interactions between Vrabel and Russini continue to surface, keeping public curiosity high. For now, Vrabel’s return to team facilities marks a step back into routine. Whether that also signals a turning point in the controversy is something only time will reveal.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel was seen shopping alone at a Salt Lake City airport while taking time away from the New England Patriots to seek counseling. His absence during the NFL Draft drew attention, though the team supported his break. This comes amid ongoing scrutiny tied to NFL insider Dianna Russini.
